about.title: About me
about.p1: Hi, I'm Jens! Born in '88, married, dad, and dog owner. After my time as a telecommunications department manager in an electronics retail store, I'm now doing what I love: fulfilling my dream of programming.
about.p2: I love combining aesthetics and technology: thoughtful design, solid software architecture, and absolute precision down to the last detail are my standards. This is how unique solutions that stand out are created.

facts.p1_back: I work in an agile, solution-oriented, and structured manner. Close communication within the team and the implementation of best practices are particularly important to me.
facts.p2_back: Whether Angular, Node.js, or relational databases – I love diving into new technologies and building robust, scalable solutions.
facts.exp_back: As a developer. Previously 6 years telecommunications department manager.
facts.fun_back: AI is like a blacksmith's hammer: it helps me shape things, but I remain the master of the code.

join.name: Join
join.subtitle: Developer Academy Group Project
join.description: A Kanban-based task manager. Create and organize tasks with drag-and-drop features and assign users and categories.
join.umsetzung: This project is my upcoming highlight. It is currently being developed as an extensive group project and will soon be available here in full.

dabubble.name: DABubble
dabubble.subtitle: Developer Academy Group Project
dabubble.description: An interactive real-time team chat in the style of Slack. Enables fast and structured communication in channels, direct messages and threads.
dabubble.umsetzung: Built with Angular and Supabase as the backend. Real-time synchronization across channels, threads and direct messages, including authentication.

el_pollo_loco.name: El Pollo Loco
el_pollo_loco.subtitle: Jump 'n' Run Game
el_pollo_loco.description: A run-and-throw game based on an object-oriented approach. Help Pepe find coins and tabasco salsa to fight the crazy hen.
el_pollo_loco.umsetzung: Fully object-oriented in vanilla JavaScript. Custom game loop, collision detection and sound management entirely without a framework.

pokedex.name: Pokedex
pokedex.subtitle: Pokémon Encyclopedia
pokedex.description: A simple library based on the PokeAPI to find and display your favorite Pokémon with all their stats.
pokedex.umsetzung: Connects to the PokeAPI via asynchronous fetch calls. With search and filter functionality as well as a detail view per Pokémon.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Personal Website
portfolio.description: This interactive developer portfolio with a modern tile design and full multilingual support.
portfolio.umsetzung: Component-based in Angular with signals, OnPush and full multilingual support. Responsive tile design with 3D flip animations.
